overall.description: Cinematic walkthrough of the 'Afterlife' nightclub from Cyberpunk 2077, featuring vibrant neon purple and cyan lighting, dense crowds of NPCs, and futuristic cyberpunk architecture. The camera moves smoothly from an upper balcony down to the main dance floor and approaches the DJ stage.

scene_state.functional_zone: upper balcony overlooking main nightclub floor

events.description: afterlife sign becomes visible on left wall, adding red neon glow to the scene

agents.ego_description: walking along the upper balcony railing, overlooking the main dance floor below

notable_agents.action: patron leaning against the balcony railing looking down at the dance floor

entered.detail: circular illuminated bar structure with neon edging at the center of the club
suspended square neon light fixtures glowing cyan and magenta
transparent glass safety railing along the balcony edge
tall vertical light strips running floor to ceiling with alternating cyan and pink glow
circular honeycomb-patterned light installation on the ceiling
illuminated wall sign reading 'AFTERLIFE' in red neon letters

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on the upper balcony level of a futuristic cyberpunk nightclub, with the camera moving along a glass railing overlooking a circular bar below. Neon purple and cyan fixtures illuminate the space, and the 'Afterlife' sign becomes visible on the left wall as the camera progresses.

scene_state.functional_zone: staircase transition from upper balcony to main floor

events.description: begins descending the illuminated staircase from the upper level to the main dance floor

agents.ego_description: moving past the balcony railing and descending the neon-edged stairs toward the main floor

entered.detail: stairway with illuminated neon edges leading down to the main floor
transparent railing along the staircase descent

segments.scene_description: The camera moves along the balcony toward a staircase, transitioning from the open balcony to a narrower stairwell. At around 18 seconds, the descent begins down neon-lit stairs, leaving the circular bar behind and revealing the crowd on the main floor below.

scene_state.functional_zone: main dance floor approaching DJ stage

events.description: exits staircase and enters the open main dance floor, surrounded by crowd
slows approach while navigating through denser crowd near the stage area

agents.ego_description: walking through the crowded dance floor toward the stage and DJ booth, navigating between dancing patrons

notable_agents.action: dancer in red outfit moving energetically in front of the stage
group of patrons dancing near the stage stairs

entered.detail: elevated stage platform with DJ equipment and performers
raised performance area with illuminated steps leading up to it

segments.scene_description: Now on the main dance floor, the camera moves through a dense crowd of dancing NPCs toward the stage. The DJ booth becomes the focal point ahead, with the hexagonal ceiling array dominating the view overhead. The camera slows as it approaches the stage area, navigating through the energetic crowd.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a high vantage point on a futuristic balcony down into the heart of a crowded, neon-lit dance floor. It begins by gliding along a glass railing overlooking a circular bar, where purple and cyan fixtures illuminate the space and the Afterlife sign emerges on the left wall. As the camera reaches the edge of the balcony, it transitions into a narrow stairwell and descends the neon-lit steps, leaving the upper level behind to reveal the bustling activity below. The scene then opens onto the main floor, moving through a dense crowd of dancing NPCs while a massive hexagonal ceiling array dominates the view overhead. Finally, the camera slows its pace as it navigates through the energetic crowd, drawing closer to the DJ booth at the center of the stage.
